title: matricaria coccinea
intro: Matricaria coccinea, also known as red chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Matricaria coccinea include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
